1: Beloved, while using all diligence to write to you concerning our common salvation, I found it necessary to write to you exhorting you to earnestly contend for the faith once for all delivered to the saints.
But you, beloved, building up yourselves upon your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit,
Keep yourselves in the love of God, awaiting the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ unto eternal life.
But to Him who is able to guard you from stumbling and to set you before His glory without blemish in exultation.

3.text: The faith here does not refer to our act of believing, but to the objective contents of the New Testament revelation concerning the person and work of Christ.

20.text: In a time of apostasy and spiritual decline, our protection is to build ourselves up in the truth and stay in the organic union with the Triune God through prayer.
